title: Kripttic's UHC essentials
description: This is a simple pack for modern PvP that clears up your screen. I made the weapons, food, and tools smaller so they don't get in the way during a fight. It’s a clean, low-profile edit built for better visibility and competitive play.
body:
Features:
- 1.21+ support
- Small weapons and items (less screen block)
- New armor textures
- Low shield
- Low fire
- Cubed cobwebs
- Crit particles
- Clear water
- Transparent GUI
- Custom crosshair
- Custom font
